candidates.why: Standard top-line revenue label; matches target definition for total revenue/sales. Duplicated row but same label and numbers, so this is the primary revenue line.
This is clearly a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

variables.notes: Revenue is clearly labeled and distinct from COGS.

candidates.why: Component of cost of sales but not the full COGS; a more aggregate COGS line exists.
Another COGS-related component, but there is an explicit aggregate COGS line available.
Adjustment component to derive COGS, not the full COGS itself.
Specific direct cost component; too narrow to represent total COGS.
Explicit aggregate COGS line that combines the cost components; best representation of total cost of goods sold.
Likely overlapping with Cost of materials; unclear/unused here and less appropriate than explicit COGS line.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement cost; should not be used for COGS.

variables.notes: Using the explicit COGS aggregate line instead of components.

candidates.why: Label suggests an SG&A-type bucket but appears unused (all nans). Given more specific populated SG&A components are available, this is less preferred.
Classic SG&A-type overhead expense bucket (other operating expenses), clearly populated; fits XSGA definition.
Another SG&A-style operating expense bucket with values; should be included as part of SG&A components.
Explicit selling expenses, a core component of SG&A.
This is operating income, not expense; by definition should be excluded from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selected the clear SG&A expense components and excluded operating income. Omitted the largely empty generic 'Other Operating' bucket since specific populated components exist.

candidates.why: Generic R&D label but appears with no recent values; may be legacy/unused. A more detailed R&D expense line exists.
Represents capitalized R&D (balance sheet treatment), not current-period expensed R&D; not ideal as XRD, which targets expense.
Explicit, well-populated R&D expense line; best match for current-period R&D expense for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; while R&D-related, it is an amortization item rather than the main R&D expense. Secondary at best.
Duplicate/variant R&D label with no preview values; could be historical, but less clear than the main supplemental R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset for capitalized R&D, not an income statement expense.
Gross capitalized R&D asset amount on balance sheet, not the period expense.
Accumulated amortization of R&D asset, a balance sheet contra-asset, not the P&L expense itself.
Balance sheet R&D asset residual; not a direct expense line.

variables.notes: Primary R&D expense is the supplemental expense line; a generic R&D line is included as secondary priority for potential older periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense related to lease liabilities; valid but narrower than the net interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line (net of capitalized interest), best overall representation of interest expense for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure for lease-related interest; useful backup if main interest expense line is missing for some years.
Generic interest expense label but appears unused in preview; good fallback if populated in other years.
Represents interest income (opposite sign of expense); not appropriate as primary XINT when expense lines are available.
Net interest line combining income and expense; could be fallback if pure expense lines were absent, but here it is secondary.
Additional interest income disclosure; not an interest expense measure.
Equity measure, unrelated to interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered to prefer the primary net interest expense line, then specific lease interest expense lines, with generic interest expense and net interest income as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Explicit total equity label but appears unpopulated in preview; may be a structural duplicate of 'Total Equity'.
Represents a component of equity, not total equity; unsuitable as standalone book equity.
Clearly populated total equity line matching book equity / shareholders' equity; best choice for BE.
Total equity including any minority interest; useful for MIB but not ideal for pure book equity attributable to shareholders.
Represents total assets (or assets=equity+liabilities), not equity alone; incorrect for BE.

variables.notes: Using the populated 'Total Equity' line as primary book equity, with 'TOTAL EQUITY' as a structural backup.

candidates.why: Represents combined total equity and minority interest; there is no separate minority interest line to isolate MIB itself, suggesting MIB is effectively zero or not reported separately.

variables.notes: No separate minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present; treating MIB as not reported (interpreted as zero).
